opening_line: Hi - I read a review where andrew mentioned tidy finishes on a job with Edgar Landscapes & driveways Ltd. That stood out.
source_quote: After meeting Bill, Josh and Tony, it was clear from the very start, we didn't need to search other companies and check the price quoted. It was clear that they knew, what they were doing and were passionate about making sure the project was completed correctly and that we would be happy with it as
why_this_angle: Lead with review detail about tidy finishes (andrew)
suggested_whatsapp: Hi, Julius here. I build websites for local trades. One of your Google reviews from andrew mentioned tidy finishes - I mocked up a one-page site around that. No obligation - want a quick look?

follow_up_replies.text: One-page site from £300. Includes mobile layout and quote form.
No problem - I will remove the preview. Thanks for your time.
